sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_timestamps (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, event_time TIMESTAMP, event_text TEXT);
INSERT INTO test_timestamps (event_time, event_text) VALUES (timestamp '2023-01-01 12:00:00', 'New Year Celebration'), (timestamp '2023-06-15 15:30:30', 'Mid-Year Review');
SELECT id, event_text, minute(event_time) AS event_minute FROM test_timestamps WHERE minute(event_time) > 0;
CREATE TABLE temp_data (temp_time TIMETZ, temp_value FLOAT);
INSERT INTO temp_data (temp_time, temp_value) VALUES (timetz '10:25:05.123456+00:00', 98.6), (timetz '12:30:00.789123+00:00', NULL);
SELECT t.id, t.event_text, minute(t.event_time) AS minute_val FROM test_timestamps t JOIN temp_data td ON minute(t.event_time) = minute(td.temp_time) WHERE td.temp_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, event_text, minute(event_time + INTERVAL '1 hour') AS minute_plus_one_hour FROM test_timestamps;
SELECT DISTINCT hour(minute(timestamp '2023-01-01 10:23:45')) + minute(timestamp '2023-01-01 10:23:45') AS total_minutes FROM test_timestamps HAVING total_minutes > 20;
CREATE TABLE sample_data (sample_time TIMESTAMP, sample_value INT);
SELECT COUNT(*), MIN(minute(sample_time)) FROM sample_data GROUP BY sample_value HAVING MIN(minute(sample_time)) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT t.id, t.event_text, minute(timestamp(EPOCH + (event_time AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'))) AS minutes_from_epoch FROM test_timestamps t WHERE minute(event_time) < 30;
